Animation Group 0 (0x00): "walking & standing stuff". 10 animations

Animation Group 4 (0x04): "turning around". 2 animations

NameConverted ValueRaw DataNotes
Damage Scaling137%2CHigher means more damage taken, Lower means less damage taken
